25.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

25.kj: bear up, direct, be (un-)equal, mete, ponder, tell, weigh.

25.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
25.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);
